description:

Source task 11/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add negative tests for ambiguous syntax that might confuse users.

Epic closure criteria:

- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Removed  from the V3 parser and added negative tests for ambiguous forms: missing agent id, , lifecycle guardrails, controls tool, and old output blocks. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E1: Add negative tests for ambiguous syntax that might confuse users
